NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN (TRANSACTION ID # 15125034) FILED BY PETITIONER ENCINEAS, SARITA HEARING SET FOR JUN-04-2015 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER SARITA ENCINEAS' PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN IS CONTINUED TO JULY 2, 2015. MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF THE PETITION AND THE NOTICE OF THE HEARING TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN JUNE 12, 2015 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. PETITIONER IS INSTRUCTED TO GIVE NOTICE. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-02-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Jul-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Martin, Esq. (562-219-3290) for Petitioner/Moving party Sarita Encineas through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

The Court reads the tentative ruling. The Petitioner requests to dismiss the matter with prejudice since parties have reached a stipulation. The Court grants the request. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER SARITA ENCINEAS' Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is Dismissed with prejudice. Prevailing party to submit order with stipulation in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Continued To Jul-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas G. Martin, Esq. of Foresight Legal Group, (562-21-3290), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Sarita Encineas, Petitioner and moving party.
Robert Halpin, Representative of Brittania, Inc., Respondent, (650-333-9239).

Petitioner submits to the tentative ruling. Court advises Mr. Halpin that corporation should be represented by a lawyer.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: PETITIONER SARITA ENCINEAS' Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is CONTINUED to
July 2, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the petition and the Notice of the Hearing to Department 501 no later than June 12, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Petitioner is instructed to give notice. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
